meta.title: fak product-concept scorecard — durable / real / useful-today
meta._doc: Each row is one fak product concept (a CLAIMS.md '##' section), scored on whether a PERSON can pick it up and use it today. The scorecard cross-checks every row against the real tree (the CLAIMS tag the concept carries, whether the first command's cmd dir + verb resolve, whether the witness/entry paths exist), so the score cannot be gamed by editing data alone. Regenerate the doc: python tools/product_scorecard.py --markdown-dir docs/product-scorecard

managed_context_slos.name: Context visibility
managed_context_slos.detail: No managed-context scorecard pane yet shows known, unknown, and assumed context buckets with source refs.
managed_context_slos.next_action: add the report fixture and mark this SLO pass only when the rendered buckets are witnessed

managed_context_slos.name: Deterministic resets
managed_context_slos.detail: No product scorecard fixture yet proves hidden resets preserve deterministic continuity over a long run.
managed_context_slos.next_action: add a reset fixture with before/after session state and continuation evidence

managed_context_slos.name: Budget compliance
managed_context_slos.detail: No product scorecard fixture yet proves context/token/time budgets are enforced across reset boundaries.
managed_context_slos.next_action: add a budget exhaustion fixture that proves the drain/reset decision and remaining-budget accounting

managed_context_slos.name: Query correctness
managed_context_slos.detail: No product scorecard fixture yet proves missing context becomes a typed query with a recorded answer.
managed_context_slos.next_action: add a context-query fixture with known, unknown, assumed, and answered states

managed_context_slos.name: Cache preservation
managed_context_slos.detail: No product scorecard fixture yet proves managed context preserves the cacheable prefix across turns and resets.
managed_context_slos.next_action: add a prefix-stability fixture with the first divergent span or a prefix-stable witness

managed_context_slos.name: Memory-promotion safety
managed_context_slos.detail: No product scorecard fixture yet proves raw observations cannot silently become durable standing assumptions.
managed_context_slos.next_action: add a promotion-safety fixture that distinguishes witnessed facts from raw observations
